security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ws://localhost:* wss://localhost:* http://localhost:* https://api.github.com https://raw.githubusercontent.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:

bundle.shortDescription: DC++ client for Yggdrasil mesh network
bundle.longDescription: Aurora is a modern DC++ file sharing client built for the Yggdrasil mesh network. Features real-time search, encrypted transfers, and an Apple-inspired dark UI.
